title: Revolut seeks de novo banking charter with OCC
message_html: Revolut seeks de novo banking charter with OCC ...
snippet: The Office of the Comptroller of the Currency has recently given conditional approval to several stablecoin issuers to become banks.

title: Exegy and Strands team on prediction market and digital asset data feed
message_html: Exegy and Strands team on prediction market and digital asset data feed ...
snippet: Exegy, the capital markets platform that links elite trading firms to the global venues where they transact, and Strands, the premier multi-asset execution and tokenization infrastructure provider, today announced the inclusion of real-time data from the Strands digital asset platform into the Exegy
